name: productize-ai-draft-generation
title: Productize owner AI draft generation
description: 店主 AI NPC 草稿当前是确定性模板，需要接入 owner LLM / 明确降级模板边界。
creator: lijin
notes: Implemented owner AI NPC draft productization on 2026-05-06: character draft generation now uses owner default LLM when configured, returns source metadata, transparently falls back to local_template_fallback when missing/failing, derives fallback names from owner input, and frontend displays source-aware copy. Verification passed: focused backend pytest, owner config regression, compileall, frontend full npm test, typecheck, build.
